data.title: Claritycon2026 Children's Mental Health Conference on July 13-14, 2026, 2 full days, Early Bird Pricing till 4-30-26, by Clarity Child Guidance Center offering mental health services for children aged 3-17.
data.description: The duration of the event has been extended to cover two full days. Early Bird Pricing will be available until April 30, 2026. Located in San Antonio, the Clarity Child Guidance Center has been in operation since 1886. As the sole nonprofit entity in South Texas, it offers a range of mental health services for children between the ages of 3 and 17, as well as support for their families in coping with various challenges.
ARGAN and DECATHLON have partnered to reduce carbon emissions, aiming to achieve a significant decrease in their carbon footprint.

data.title: TD Cowen becomes more bearish on $60B Bitcoin company Strategy due to $1.44B cash reserve and potential Bitcoin sales, lowering MSTR target.
data.description: Following the establishment of a $1.44 billion cash reserve by Strategy, it has been disclosed that there may be a need to sell Bitcoin. Consequently, TD Cowen has revised its price target for MSTR downwards.
IRELAND WILL NOT PARTICIPATE IN OR BROADCAST THE 2026 EUROVISION SONG CONTEST

data.title: Haute-Chaudière Wind Project in Quebec secures financing for 124MW project; construction set to begin after government approval.
data.description: In Montréal, EDF power solutions Canada and Énergie Renouvelable Granit Inc. have secured non-recourse construction and term financing for the Haute-Chaudière Wind project, a 124MW initiative in Quebec's Regional County Municipality of Granit. This achievement comes after receiving authorization from the Government of Quebec, allowing the project to proceed. The necessary capital for the venture has been finalized, marking a significant step forward in the project's development.

data.title: Q3 sees decrease in earnings year-over-year, with nearly 25% facing functional unemployment. Washington, Dec. 4, 2025.
data.description: A recent report reveals that approximately 25% of workers are struggling to secure full-time positions that offer wages above the poverty line. This survey, conducted by the Ludwig Institute, highlights a concerning trend where middle-income workers are experiencing a decline in their earnings compared to the previous year. The data suggests that a significant portion of the workforce is facing challenges related to "functional unemployment."

data.title: Photographer Alex Webb presents "Italianness" in 2026 Lavazza Calendar at Art Basel Miami Beach, Dec. 2025.
data.description: Renowned photographer Alex Webb is showcasing his exploration of "Italianness" through a collection of photographs at the Miami Beach Convention Center during the Art Basel Miami Beach 2025 event. Additionally, an offsite exhibition will be held in Miami's Design District. The exhibition is set to feature a diverse range of images and will be open to the public from December 4, 2025. This event is part of Art Basel Miami Beach, a gathering that attracts over 70,000 visitors annually and showcases works from leading artists worldwide. Webb's exhibition is expected to draw significant attention and contribute to the cultural vibrancy of the event.

data.title: Flowserve wins 2025 Vaaler Award for INNOMAG TB-MAG Dual Drive, recognized for innovation in chemical industry.
data.description: Flowserve Corporation, a prominent provider of flow control products and services for global infrastructure markets, was awarded the 2025 Vaaler Award in the Fluid Flow category for its innovative INNOMAG TB-MAG Dual Drive magnetic-drive pump with true secondary containment. The award was granted by an independent panel of engineers from top operating and engineering companies. The company's achievement highlights its commitment to excellence in product development and industry recognition. Flowserve Corporation is listed on the NYSE under the ticker symbol FLS.

data.title: Maryland biotech startup Nanocrine unveils RT-Chip™ biosensor platform for real-time tumor observation in cancer care.
data.description: On December 4, 2025, Nanocrine, a biotech startup in Maryland, introduced its RT-Chip™ technology, revolutionizing cancer care. This innovative biosensor platform allows for live monitoring of tumor behavior with unprecedented accuracy. The RT-Chip™ technology has the potential to significantly impact the field of oncology with its real-time capabilities.

data.title: Global electric motor market to reach $373.9 billion by 2032 with 9.5% CAGR. Rising demand for energy-efficient motors, consumer electronics, and electric vehicles fueling growth.
data.description: The global electric motor market is experiencing growth due to a surge in demand for energy-efficient electric motors, a rise in sales of consumer electronics and appliances in developing nations, and an increase in the popularity of electric vehicles. These factors have led to a significant uptick in market activity. The market expansion is particularly prominent in developing regions where there is a growing need for such products. The city of PORTLAND in the state of Oregon witnessed substantial developments in this sector on December 4, 2025, as reported by PRNewswire. This trend signifies a shift towards more sustainable and environmentally friendly technologies, with promising growth potential.

data.title: nCino surpasses Q3 expectations, with quarterly earnings of 31 cents/share and sales of $152.163 million, raising FY26 guidance.
data.description: Ncino, Inc. (NASDAQ: NCNO) surpassed expectations in their third-quarter financial report, with earnings reaching 31 cents per share, exceeding the anticipated 20 cents per share. The company's quarterly sales stood at $152.163 million, also beating the expected $146.627 million. As a result of this performance, Ncino has revised its FY26 guidance, increasing the adjusted EPS range from $0.77-$0.80 to $0.90-$0.91 and raising sales guidance from $585.000 million-$589.000 million to $591.900 million-$593.400 million. The CEO expressed pride in the team's accomplishments and credited their advancement in the AI sector for this success. For more details, the full article can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: OpenAI buying Neptune to boost AI model training with real-time experiment tracking and analysis. Read more.
data.description: OpenAI recently acquired Neptune to enhance its AI model training operations, with a focus on real-time monitoring and analysis of experiments. Important to note is that the acquisition aims to strengthen OpenAI's capabilities in this regard.

data.title: Internova Travel Group unveils new luxury travel trends at ILTM Cannes. Data shows upscale bookings on the rise in 2025.
data.description: New data released by Internova Travel Group in Cannes, France on December 4, 2025, sheds light on the evolving trends among affluent travelers in 2025. The report highlights a shift towards luxurious modes of travel including private jets, yachts, and exotic destinations. This data provides year-to-date insights into luxury bookings, showcasing the preferences of high-end travelers.

data.title: 401GO partners with Catapult HQ, Inc. to streamline workflow for advisors, serving over 30,000 users, reducing manual processes.
data.description: In Sandy, Utah, a new partnership has been formed between 401GO, a 401(k) platform tailored for advisors, and Catapult HQ, Inc., a prominent digital RFP system in the finance industry. This collaboration aims to streamline the plan comparison and selection process for advisors by eliminating existing bottlenecks. Catapult's platform, which is utilized by over 30,000 advisors, will now integrate directly with 401GO's recordkeeping system. This integration will result in a smoother workflow for advisors, reducing the need for manual handoffs.

data.title: ALS Association pledges $2 million for early-stage clinical trials of 2 new ALS therapies. Accelerating new treatments.
data.description: The ALS Association has recently announced the recipients of its 2025 Hoffman ALS Clinical Trial Awards Program in Arlington, Virginia on December 4th. This funding, intended to hasten the advancement of new treatments for ALS, was granted to several individuals. The specific amount awarded was not disclosed, but it is part of the Association's ongoing efforts to support innovative research in ALS treatment.

data.title: Genesco Inc. (NYSE: GCO) reports Q3 EPS of 79 cents (missing street view of 88 cents) on sales of $616.2 million. Journeys saw 4% growth and e-commerce decline of 3%. Gross margin contracted to 46.8% from 47.8%.
data.description: Genesco Inc. (NYSE: GCO) saw a decline in its stock value following the release of disappointing third-quarter results. The company reported adjusted earnings of 79 cents per share, falling short of the anticipated 88 cents. Quarterly sales stood at $616.2 million, showing a 3% increase compared to the previous year, but missing the expected $618.6 million. Sales growth was driven by a 4% increase at Journeys, 2% at Schuh, and 3% each at Johnston & Murphy and Genesco Brands. Comparable sales rose by 3%, with store sales up by 5% and e-commerce down by 3%, making up 23% of retail sales. The gross margin shrank to 46.8% from 47.8% due to factors like tariff pressures and license exits within the Genesco Brands Group. Visitors can access the complete article on Benzinga.com.

data.title: BTC stabilizes despite weakening demand, resembling Q1 2022 with 25% supply underwater. ETFs and futures show decreased interest, raising concerns.
data.description: Bitcoin has remained steady above crucial thresholds, reminiscent of early 2022 as over 25% of the supply is currently at a loss. Demand for Bitcoin is decreasing in ETFs and futures markets, indicating potential risks for investors.
Ukraine presidency: President of Ukraine Volodymyr Zelenskyy held a telephone conversation with President of the European Council António Costa.
